title: Soak Test - No Headset connected, app in the background, phone idle
scenario: Soak test: app remains stable without memory leaks or crashes after being idle in background for several hours with no headset connected, then brought back to foreground.
steps: Go to home screen (no headset connected)
Put the app in the background
Leave the phone idle for several hours (ideally overnight)
Bring the app to the foreground
expected: App remains running in the background and user can interact normally when brought to foreground.
